basic_details.job_title: District Collector Office Washim Contract Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate with Marathi and English typing skills, knowledge of cash book and DSR, computer knowledge.
qualification.details: Contract Clerk (Female Only) Minimum graduate Marathi 30 and Marathi 40 P.M. Typing Pass English 30 and English 40 PM Typing Pass Knowledge about writing a cashbook Knowledge of maintaining the Hostel Storage Register (DSR) Computer knowledge Experience in accounting is preferred.

selection_process: Application submission with required documents Interview (implied)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://washim.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the District Collector Office Washim recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the District Collector Office Washim recruitment is 01-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the office by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is कंत्राटी लिपीक (फक्त महिला), which translates to Contractual Clerk (Female Only).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Contractual Clerk post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be graduates and possess Marathi and English typing skills (30 WPM and 40 WPM respectively), knowledge of cash book and DSR, and computer knowledge.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Contractual Clerk position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly honorarium of Rs. 8,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Contractual Clerk post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Contractual Clerk (Female Only) post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to submit their applications by post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any preference for experience?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with experience in accounting-related work.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Collector Office Washim: https://washim.gov.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to submit self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves application submission with required documents, followed by an interview.
